title: Hardys 5pc Paint Brush Set Mix | Essential Brushes for All Wall, Ceiling & Paint Decorating | Synthetic Bristle, Straight Line & Angled for Cutting In & Smooth Finish
features: 𝐏𝐑𝐄𝐌𝐈𝐔𝐌 𝐐𝐔𝐀𝐋𝐈𝐓𝐘 𝐁𝐑𝐔𝐒𝐇𝐄𝐒 - Hardys decorating paint brush set has synthetic PET and PPT bristles for excellent application, retention, and distribution. Our high-quality paint brushes can set and hold paint well for smooth and even surface coverage.

𝐕𝐄𝐑𝐒𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐋𝐄 𝐏𝐀𝐈𝐍𝐓𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐀𝐂𝐂𝐄𝐒𝐒𝐎𝐑𝐈𝐄𝐒 - Our paint brush set for walls and ceilings is perfect for professional or DIY enthusiasts' painting tools and collections. This brush can paint intricate and large surfaces with paint, glue, varnish, satin, and more.

𝐑𝐄𝐋𝐈𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 & 𝐃𝐔𝐑𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 - Our paint brushes are constructed with durability in mind for long-lasting and consistent results. These straight and angled decorating paint brushes set are perfect for cutting in and performing any painting task necessary.

𝐄𝐍𝐇𝐀𝐍𝐂𝐄𝐃 𝐏𝐀𝐈𝐍𝐓𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐄𝐗𝐏𝐄𝐑𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐂𝐄 - Elevate and achieve professional-level paint results with our superior performance and ergonomic control paint brush set. Our high-quality brushes for painting wood and fences also work on walls, furniture and crafts.

𝐁𝐑𝐔𝐒𝐇 𝐒𝐏𝐄𝐂𝐈𝐅𝐈𝐂𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍𝐒 - Hardys 5-pc paint brushes decorating set includes two 2-in flat brushes, one 1.5-in and one 1-in flat brush, and one 1.5-inch angled brush. Whether cutting in or covering large areas, there's a brush suitable for the task.
description: Product Description Why choose Hardys 5pc Paint Brush Set? Designed with advanced bristle filaments, comfortable ergonomic grip, and rust-resistant stainless steel ferrules, these paint brushes are designed to be your go to brush in any DIY or professional painters arsenal. Which jobs are the best suited for? Whether it’s a one-and-done job, or you need some brushes to keep coming back to, these are for you. The filaments pick up and hold gloss, varnish, matte, satin, glue and more, and only deposit when you’re ready to cut-in or lay off. How precise are they? The advanced filaments are designed to hold their shape over time, while flexible enough for delicate touches. The level of stiffness covers a perfect balance of control and flexibility, perfect for precise cutting in, trim, edges and corners. Are they durable? The advantage of the stainless steel ferrules are twofold: They’re excellent at tightly binding and holding the filaments in place, reducing bristle loss. They’re also incredibly rust resistant and tough, offering durability and longevity.
